description_long: This nightclub is a single-story, rectangular building with a flat, dark roof and a utilitarian, industrial exterior. The facade features a prominent sign above the entrance, flanked by metal fencing and a collection of utility boxes, trash bins, and scattered debris, suggesting a gritty urban environment. The walls are clad in weathered, corrugated metal and concrete, with small, barred windows and visible air conditioning units. The rear and sides of the building are less adorned, showing service doors, vents, and additional refuse, reinforcing the back-alley, functional aesthetic. The main entrance is marked by a double door, signage, and a small awning, with some steps and a ramp for accessibility. Overall, the structure exudes a rugged, no-frills vibe typical of underground or industrial-themed nightclubs.
description: A rugged, industrial-style nightclub with a flat roof, metal siding, and urban signage, surrounded by fencing and utility elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, prominent signage, fencing, and various utility items clustered near the door.
description_view_1: Rear view with minimal decoration, visible service doors, small windows, and scattered debris on the ground.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the building's length, corrugated metal siding, vents, and trash bins along the wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more fencing, additional signage, and a less prominent entrance area.
attribute_signage: A large rectangular sign above the main entrance displays a nightclub logo and text, with a white background and colored accents. Additional smaller signs are present on the door and side wall, made of printed plastic or metal, some with illuminated elements.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance features a double door set into a recessed area, with a small awning above and flanked by metal fencing. The doors are solid, likely metal, with signage and a step leading up, and a ramp for accessibility.
attribute_queue_barriers: Metal fencing panels are positioned in front of the entrance, serving as queue barriers or access control, painted gray and extending several meters along the facade.
